aiAnalysis.conclusion: Container weather-ctf in GKE cluster private-gke-cluster (GCP project cybershield-rnd-wiz, namespace sec-demo) was compromised with a full post-exploitation attack chain: python3.7 queried the cryptomining pool pool.supportxmr.com, LinPEAS was downloaded and executed as root, GCP IMDS OAuth tokens and /etc/shadow+SSH keys were harvested and exfiltrated to paste.rs, container escape was attempted via capsh/fdisk/mount, and C2 telemetry was sent to tools.hacktricks.wiki. The service account default (sec-demo) credentials were successfully stolen and exfiltrated externally. While the sec-demo namespace and weather-ctf naming suggest a possible CTF/lab environment, no authorization records were found and the successful credential exfiltration to external services represents confirmed hostile activity requiring immediate response.
